query: SELECT state, COUNT(*) as total FROM articles WHERE state IS NOT NULL AND state != '' GROUP BY state ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 30;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user AGjn9SpCJUmEG7Z.root --database 6wzLmWaAhQKjEBEoadSqJc --execute SELECT state, COUNT(*) as total FROM articles WHERE state IS NOT NULL AND state != '' GROUP BY state ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 30;
